rationale: Gov't Code §2155.075 governs competitive bidding value factors for state procurement. It is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amount. No conflict exists.
quote: For a purchase made through competitive bidding, the comptroller or other state agency making the purchase must specify in the request for bids:
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this procurement statute.
